content.text: How can I identify a set of genetic variants that are present in a specific patient and categorized as, for example, 'snv'?
What if one of the specified variants is present in the patient's data, but their genotype call shows a completely wild-type (reference) state?

If you only want to include variants that definitely show an altered allele, your current regex (`re.compile('1|2')`) handles this. To exclude any variant flagged as reference, you would need a more complex negative projection or exclusion query.
That makes sense, thanks for the detail.
